title: Content Module Schema
description: Canonical schema for formalized story content modules (e.g., God of Carnage)

module_id.description: Unique identifier for the content module (e.g., 'god_of_carnage')

contract_version.description: Version of the MVP contract this module adheres to

relationship_axes.description: Relationship axes and dynamics between characters (ID → axis object)

scene_phases.description: Scene phases and structure (ID → phase object)

trigger_definitions.description: Trigger definitions for this module (ID → trigger object)

ending_conditions.description: Ending conditions and flip conditions (ID → ending object)

phase_transitions.description: Transitions between scene phases (keyed by transition ID)

escalation_axes.description: Escalation axes for intensity/complexity (ID → escalation axis object)
